testcases.title: Valid login
steps: Enter a valid username in the username field
Enter a valid password in the password field

testcases.title: Invalid password
steps: Enter a valid username in the username field
Enter an invalid password in the password field
testcases.expected: An error message is shown for invalid password

testcases.title: Invalid username
steps: Enter an invalid username in the username field
Enter a valid password in the password field
testcases.expected: An error message is shown for invalid username

testcases.title: Locked user
steps: Enter the username for a locked account in the username field
Enter the corresponding password in the password field
testcases.expected: A "locked user" error message is shown
